arts.ttl: Juventus prefer David Hancko over Milan Skriniar
arts.sum: Juventus are actively seeking defensive reinforcements for the January transfer window. Injuries to key players Bremer and Cabal have forced Cristiano Giuntoli to re-enter the market, aiming to provide coach Thiago Motta with at least one, if not two, new defenders. The post Juventus prefer David Hancko over Milan Skriniar appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Juventus meet with David Hancko’s agent
arts.sum: Juventus have taken a significant step in their pursuit of Feyenoord defender David Hancko. The post Juventus meet with David Hancko’s agent appeared first on FootItalia.com.
